description: SendCanary complete email security bundle: publishes CNAMEs for DMARC and BIMI (pointing at SendCanary-managed per-tenant record targets) plus an SPF TXT record. The CNAME indirection lets SendCanary evolve the underlying policy, selectors, and BIMI logo on your behalf - no more editing DNS every time you want to move DMARC to reject or rotate BIMI. Use this for a managed 'set and forget' setup; use the individual DMARC / SPF / BIMI templates if you prefer owning the raw record values yourself. SendCanary (https://sendcanary.com) is an email authentication platform that monitors DMARC reports, detects spoofing, and automates DNS remediation for domain owners.
variableDescription: dmarcTarget: CNAME target SendCanary assigns for DMARC (e.g. <token>._dmarc.sendcanary.com). spfRecord: complete SPF TXT record value (e.g. 'v=spf1 include:spf.google.com include:amazonses.com ~all'). bimiTarget: CNAME target for BIMI (e.g. <token>._bimi.sendcanary.com).
